session_prompt: What should persist from this week?
observations: The architecture conversation improved once the orchestrator conflict was named.
Useful automation should reduce operator scheduling burden.
A scorecard is only useful when it measures artifact quality, not existence.
prior_patterns: Prefer one source of truth over several compensating monitors.
Protect public sends and durable memory behind explicit gates.
